input.initialPrompt: Does C# support creating a stackalloc'd Span of native-sized integers? Can you test it and see?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know if C# supports creating a `stackalloc`'d `Span` of native-sized integers (`nint`/`nuint`). Let me write a quick C# script to test this.

toolCalls.name: bash

data.content: The `sizeof(nint)` line failed because it requires an `unsafe` context (since `nint` has no compile-time fixed size). Let me fix that — the `stackalloc` part itself should be fine:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Test stackalloc Span nint without sizeof
